A:
To navigate from the narrow alleyway to the main road, you should follow these steps:

1. Start at the beginning of the alleyway, facing the direction towards the main road.

3. As you approach the end of the alley, look for an opening or gate that leads to the main road.
4. Pass through the gate and continue walking forward onto the main road.
5. Stay aware of any traffic or obstacles on the main road as you make your way out.

By following these steps, you will successfully navigate from the narrow alleyway to the main road.
C: Continue walking straight down the alleyway; it leads directly to a gate opening onto the main road.
